LanguageData.VFEM2_MerchantCaravanStayPeriod: Caravan company will pack and move in: {0}
LanguageData.VFEM2_BarterExplanation: In order to strike a deal with the caravan company, you need to provide enough goods for the trade to become fair. The value of each item is skewed slightly in a random direction. Higher negotiation ability will increase the value of your items.
LanguageData.VFEM2_LetterFactionBaseDefeated: The caravan company camp has been destroyed.
LanguageData.VFEM2_LetterFactionBaseDefeated_FactionD: Since this was their last camp, {0} has been defeated.
LanguageData.Chemsined: Should brahmin go for your rotgut: {0}
LanguageData.VFES_bringIngredientsDesc: Bring chemfuel to the rotgut barrel to start fermentation
LanguageData.VFES_cancelIngredientsDesc: Cancel bringing chemfuel to the rotgut barrel.
LanguageData.VFES_removeProductDesc: Remove rotgut from the rotgut barrel.
LanguageData.VFET.WildMenJoin: Due to the small number of wasteland drifters, they have decided to join you.
LanguageData.VFET.WildMenRetreat: Due to the uncertainty of being able to best you, the wasteland drifters have decided to retreat.
LanguageData.VFET.WildMenJoinDesc: Wasteland drifters from a nearby survivor band found their way to {0}. After seeing your numbers, they are requesting to join you. They believe that together, you stand a better chance against the elements.\n\nYou can refuse them, but they may retaliate as a result.
LanguageData.VFET.WildMenRaidDesc: Wasteland drifters from a nearby survivor band found their way to {0}. After seeing your numbers, they have decided to raid you. You might be able to capture and recruit any survivors.
LanguageData.VFET_WildmanLetter: A wandering drifter arrives and decides to join your colony
LanguageData.VFET_AnimalsLetter: A small wasteland herd has wandered in and will join the colony
LanguageData.VFET_Discovery: A new research project has been discovered in a survivor gathering: {0}!\n\n{1}
LanguageData.VFET.LightLargeFireDesc: When burning, large fire emits blindsmoke and has a chance to encourage wasteland drifters from the local area to wander in. It's very unstable and may set things around it on fire.
LanguageData.VFET.ResearchLeft_Neolithic: Some Survivalist tech research must still be completed.
